mapper.insert: insert into user_profile ( user_id, tag_profile, category_profile, author_profile, behavior_count, profile_level, last_calculated_at, create_at, update_at ) values ( #{userId}, #{tagProfile}, #{categoryProfile}, #{authorProfile}, #{behaviorCount}, #{profileLevel}, #{lastCalculatedAt}, now(), now() ) on duplicate key update tag_profile = values(tag_profile), category_profile = values(category_profile), author_profile = values(author_profile), behavior_count = values(behavior_count), profile_level = values(profile_level), last_calculated_at = values(last_calculated_at), update_at = now()
